post.content:
Hi, I had applied through referral for Software Engineer role in Uber, India. 
YOE: 6 months

**Test Pattern:**
I got an OA of 35 mins on codesignal. It had a total of 8 questions of coding and MCQ types:
* 6 MCQs on general cs fundamentals like DBMS, Microservices, data structures
* 2 very simple coding questions: One was just basic question to calculate sum and product of numbers and other was based on hashmap basic operations.
 
I could solve all the coding questions and I am pretty confident about the MCQs. Waiting to hear back from the recruiter.

**Questions for next steps:**

I saw many posts on Uber OA having 60mins or more time but not much on the 35min format and the questions were comparitively much harder. Did anyone else attempt this format too? 

1. How long does it take for them to respond?
2. What can I expect in the next round?
I got same format of OA and heard back within 2-3 days, which role you applied frontend or backend?
Any updates? I have a similar 35 mins format OA
[@Sahana__63](https://leetcode.com/Sahana__63) I gave a similar test today for uber.. But I didn\'t get any score from codesignal after finishing the test. Can we see the score?\n

Hi there!
If you could please edit the post title to the following layout: Company Name | Stage (Phone, Onsite, OA) | Question name
We ask that you can follow these guidelines [here](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/126698/How-to-write-an-Interview-Question-post), thank you!
